Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given an event log in a table named event log with columns case id activity timestamp We want to return only the events from cases that have at most 6 events ie 6 or fewer events in the case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Steps 1 We can first count the number of events per case id 2 Then we can filter to keep only those case ids where the count is less than or equal to 6 3 Finally we can join back to the original table to get all the events for these case ids

Name: Validation - PE
Text: However note that we are asked to return the full set of events for the remaining cases

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: We can do this in two ways Option 1 Using a subquery to get the case ids with count less than or equal to 6 and then filter the main table Option 2 Using a window function to count per case and then filter

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets go with Option 1 for clarity

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step by step Step 1 Get the case ids that have 6 or fewer events Step 2 Select all columns from event log where case id is in the set from Step 1

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Alternatively we can use a JOIN

Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: However note We are using DuckDB which supports window functions and CTEs

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We can write WITH case counts AS SELECT case id COUNT as event count FROM event log GROUP BY case id HAVING COUNT less than or equal to 6 SELECT e FROM event log e INNER JOIN case counts c ON e case id equals c case id

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Alternatively we can use a subquery in the WHERE clause SELECT FROM event log WHERE case id IN SELECT case id FROM event log GROUP BY case id HAVING COUNT less than or equal to 6

Name: Validation - IND
Text: However note that if the same case id appears in multiple groups which it shouldnt because we are grouping by case id then the IN clause is safe

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Let me choose the CTE method for better readability

Name: Validation - PE
Text: But note The problem says filters out any cases containing more than six events so we want to keep cases with less than or equal to 6 events We are returning the full set of events for these cases
